race.comment: BANJORA (3) exciting gelding with an impressive winning CV. Slow into stride and raced without luck throughout with an eye-catching third over 1200m at Gosford in the Provincial Champs. Zac Lloyd goes back on and is expected to return to winning form. IMPOSANT (8) went back early from her wide draw and chipped away late when fifth over 1400m in the G3 Newcastle Stakes. Will relish the genuine tempo today and can race a touch closer from the inside gate. LORD OF BISCAY (1) sound performance first-up when snagged back early from the poor draw before motoring late with a tough third over 1400m at this track in the Provincial Champs. Tongue-tie goes on and watch for him closing quickly from the sticky gate. MISS SPACEGIRL (9) consistent mare who gets the blinkers added for the first time after she gripped on late to run fourth over 1400m at Warwick Farm in BM78 grade. Can measure up with the good weight drop.
